scripts.db:migrate:local: DB_CONNECTION=mysql DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=3307 DB_DATABASE=cs85_php_programming DB_USERNAME=cs85 DB_PASSWORD=cs85_password php artisan migrate --force
scripts.dev-local: npm run infra:up && npm run db:migrate:local && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names laravel,vite,open --prefix-colors blue,green,gray "DB_CONNECTION=mysql DB_HOST=127.0.0.1 DB_PORT=3307 DB_DATABASE=cs85_php_programming DB_USERNAME=cs85 DB_PASSWORD=cs85_password QUEUE_CONNECTION=database MAIL_MAILER=smtp MAIL_HOST=127.0.0.1 MAIL_PORT=1025 php artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=8000" "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "node scripts/open-local-app.mjs"
scripts.format: npm run format:audit && npm run format:assets && npm run format:php
scripts.format:check: npm run format:assets:check && npm run format:php:check
scripts.quality: npm run lint && npm run security:ci && npm run build
